title: 777-Rynek
description: Create your own ingame Item marketplace!
body:
### Vault plugin is required!

Create your own in-game Item Marketplace! Spin up player and admin shops with a slick GUI, dynamic pricing, taxes, and fees. Support instant buy/sell, auctions, and buy orders; limit stock, set restock timers, and auto-deliver items via secure mail. Integrates with Vault economy and PlaceholderAPI, includes anti-dupe protections, logs, and rollback tools. Per-world rules, region limits, and permissions keep it balanced. Hot-reload configs, customize icons/themes, and export shop presets to share.

Discord: https://discord.gg/777code
